mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_document_chunk ( document_id, knowledge_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, content_hash, milvus_id, metadata_json, created_at ) VALUES
(#{c.documentId}, #{c.knowledgeId}, #{c.chunkIndex}, #{c.content}, #{c.tokenCount}, #{c.contentHash}, #{c.milvusId}, #{c.metadataJson}, #{c.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, document_id, knowledge_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, content_hash, milvus_id, metadata_json, created_at FROM t_document_chunk WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC

SELECT id, document_id, knowledge_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, content_hash, milvus_id, metadata_json, created_at FROM t_document_chunk WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_document_chunk WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_document_chunk SET deleted = 1 WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
UPDATE t_document_chunk SET deleted = 1 WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId}
